scenario: NGPOWER P0 incident — causal eval set
note: Gold paths derived from data/incident_manifest.json. Separate from the original eval set so existing numbers do not move.

queries.query: Why did NGPOWER-145 become a P0 incident?
queries.gold_decision: The P0 incident NGPOWER-145 occurred because trade persistence was transactionally coupled to volume generation. The safeguard NGPOWER-49 that would have decoupled persistence was dropped at the 14-May grooming, prioritised by Maneesh Sama to protect the EPEX connectivity date, despite the coupling risk raised by Anupam Sengupta. NGPOWER-49 was owned by Rinit Jain. A database failover mid-batch then lost EU Power trades, and with no recovery path (NGPOWER-50 still in backlog) they could not be reconstructed.

queries.query: What is the status of NGPOWER-50?
queries.gold_decision: NGPOWER-50 trade replay recovery path is in backlog open.
